name: semantic-router
description: Intelligent semantic routing system. Layer2/Layer1/Layer3 parallel architecture: Layer2 (multi-word trigger_groups_all) and Layer1 (single-keyword fallback) independently determine the target pool; Layer3 (embedding) always runs in parallel to decide session continuity. B+ consecutive drift counter with 3-strike warn and 4-strike forced C-auto. soft_keywords for ambiguous terms.
author: halfmoon82
